Describes what occurred in the conflict during the month corresponding to the monthly report issued by the Defensoría del Pueblo.
Indicates whether dialogue took place during the corresponding month.
Indicates whether the conflict is new, reactivated, or had no update during the reporting month.
Status of the conflict in the reporting month. Possible values include Activo, Latente, Inactivo, or Resuelto.
Describes the reason why the Defensoría del Pueblo decided to merge the conflict with another one.
Describes the reason why the Defensoría del Pueblo changed the conflict status to latent.
Describes the reason why the Defensoría del Pueblo changed the conflict status to inactive.
Describes the manner in which the conflict was resolved.
